overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt traversing an atmospheric swamp. The clip begins inside a dilapidated wooden shelter before opening into a misty marsh with dead trees, shallow water, and dramatic morning light rays filtering through the fog.

events.description: character begins walking forward through the dark wooden structure
approaching the exit, bright outdoor light becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark dilapidated wooden shelter toward the bright exit

entered.detail: broken wooden structure with missing roof panels and exposed beams
weathered wooden floorboards with gaps showing ground below
large clay pots and urns sitting against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dark, dilapidated wooden shelter with broken roof beams and weathered floorboards. The character walks forward through the structure toward a bright exit, passing clay pottery on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp marsh with standing water

events.description: exits the wooden shelter into the open swamp environment
emerging from shadow into direct sunlight creating lens flare

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow swamp water among dead leafless trees

entered.detail: shallow murky water covering the ground with reflections
bare dead trees with no leaves scattered throughout the marsh
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the water
low-lying fog hovering over the distant water surface

segments.scene_description: The character exits the wooden shelter into a wide-open swamp marsh. The ground is covered in shallow water with dead leafless trees scattered throughout. Wooden fence posts emerge from the water on the left, and atmospheric mist hangs in the distance as the character wades forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty swamp with dramatic sun rays

events.description: sun rays become visible filtering through the trees creating god rays
entering deeper section of the marsh with more prominent water reflections

agents.ego_description: continuing through the marsh with dramatic sunlight filtering through the bare trees

entered.detail: dramatic beams of sunlight filtering through the tree canopy and mist
clusters of purple wildflowers growing among the grass

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the marsh, dramatic sun rays filter through the bare trees creating a cinematic atmosphere. Purple wildflowers appear on the right bank while the character wades through shallow pools. The dead trees that were distant now pass by on the left as the journey continues.

events.description: distant stone building becomes visible on the horizon through the mist

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant stone structure visible through the morning mist

entered.detail: stone building or ruin visible on the distant horizon
green pine trees in the distance contrasting with the dead trees

segments.scene_description: The marsh opens up into a wide area with the character walking toward a distant stone ruin visible on the horizon. The dead trees have fallen behind, replaced by scattered green pines in the far distance. The sun rays remain prominent as the water reflects the bright morning sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a ruined shelter into a vast, light-filled swamp landscape. It begins inside a dark, dilapidated wooden structure with broken beams, moving past clay pottery toward a bright exit. As the character steps outside, the scene opens into a wide marsh of shallow water and leafless trees, where atmospheric mist clings to the horizon and wooden fence posts emerge from the depths. The environment then shifts as the character wades deeper, with dramatic sun rays filtering through the bare branches and purple wildflowers appearing along the right bank. Finally, the marsh expands into a wide vista where the dead trees give way to distant green pines and the water reflects a bright morning sky, leading the way toward a stone ruin on the horizon.
